Xero Integration Not Connected

Sync invoices, payments and refunds directly to your Xero account. New transactions sync automatically every hour.

Gmail Integration Not Connected

Connect your Google Workspace account to send plain-text emails (chase reminders, re-engagement, check-ins) directly from your studio email. Emails land in Primary inbox — not Promotions or Spam.

Why connect Gmail?
✦ Emails come from mimi@dualitypole.com.au — not via Mailchimp
✦ Plain text = lands in Primary, not spam
✦ Replies come back to your inbox
✦ Google handles SPF & DKIM automatically
✦ Up to 2,000 emails/day included
Use Gmail for
Chase reminders
Student re-engagement
Welfare check-ins
Waitlist notifications
Individual announcements
Keep Mailchimp for season announcements & designed newsletters
You'll be redirected to Google to grant send-on-behalf-of permission. No password is stored — uses secure OAuth2.

Studio Waiver

Season Enrolment Agreement
Required before each season enrolment
Student FAQ & App Copy
Edit the FAQ answers and key copy shown to students in the app. Changes go live immediately after saving.
How do I access the studio with Kisi?
The studio door is already unlocked and open during all scheduled class times — you don't need Kisi just to walk in for your class. Kisi is for accessing the studio outside of scheduled class hours (e.g. practice sessions or early arrival). Your Kisi access activates before your session and remains active until 4 minutes 59 seconds into the warm-up, after which the door re-locks. To get set up: download the Kisi app (iOS or Android) and accept the invite email we sent you. For any access issues, email staff@dualitypole.com before heading in.
What happens if I'm late?
If you arrive 5 or more minutes after class starts you will not be admitted — this protects the experience for students who are already mid-warm-up. A missed class due to lateness is treated as a no-show and a $20 penalty fee applies.
How do I cancel a season class?
Cancel through the app at least 4 hours before class and a make-up credit is issued automatically. Cancellations inside 4 hours are forfeited with no credit. If you do not cancel and do not attend, a $20 no-show fee applies.
How do make-up credits work?
Make-up credits are issued when you cancel a season class with 4+ hours notice. Credits are valid for the current season only, expire at the end of the season, and are non-transferable. Use them to book any casual or catch-up slot at your level through the app.
What do I wear to a levelled pole class?
Skin contact is essential for grip: wear shorts or bike shorts and a fitted crop top or sports bra. Bare feet are best; pole shoes are also fine. Avoid moisturiser on your legs, arms and hands on class day.
How does practice time work?
Practice time is bookable through the app. Cost is $20/hr for currently-enrolled students and $30/hr for non-enrolled students. Practice time is free if you attend 3 or more classes in the same week.

💡 All email campaign design happens in Mailchimp. Contacts and tags sync automatically — just click Open Mailchimp to build and send campaigns.
Sync Settings
Auto-sync new students to Mailchimp
New sign-ups are added to your Mailchimp audience automatically
Sync tags (VIP, At Risk, Level)
Student tags are pushed as Mailchimp audience tags
Remove unsubscribes from studio system
If a student unsubscribes in Mailchimp, suppress marketing in studio too
Tags
Organise students with labels and automate tag rules
TagColourStudentsAuto-rule
VIPRuby Kim, Mia Santos + 3 moreManual only
At RiskJess Malone + 6 moreNo booking in 21 days
BlockedKylie Rhodes + 1 moreManual only
New Student4 studentsEnrolled less than 30 days ago
Owing3 studentsBalance < $0
Auto-tag Rules

Tags with rules are applied automatically and updated daily. Manual-only tags must be applied individually.

Auto-remove tags when conditions no longer apply
e.g. remove "At Risk" if student books again
Notify Mimi when a student gains an At Risk tag

Studio Notes
Noticeboard for staff and students
Staff Notes
Student Announcements
📌 Pinned Posted by Mimi · 10 May 2026
Season 5 starts August — enrolments open 15 May
Remind all students to re-enrol. New pricing takes effect. Chloe is on leave weeks 3–4, Bambi covering Mon Level 1. DO NOT change the timetable without checking with Mimi first.
⚠️ Important Posted by Mimi · 8 May 2026
Kylie Rhodes — do not allow re-enrolment without Mimi approval
Following conduct issues in Season 3. Account is currently blocked. If she contacts you directly, refer her to Mimi.
ℹ️ General Posted by Chloe · 5 May 2026
Crash mat in The Box needs replacing — corner seam is split
Temporary fix with gaffer tape for now. Don't place directly under the spinning pole. Quote requested from supplier.
📌 Pinned Posted by Mimi · 10 May 2026
Visible to students
Studio closed public holiday 9 June
The studio will be closed on Monday 9 June for the Queen's Birthday public holiday. No classes will run that day.
ℹ️ General Posted by Mimi · 8 May 2026
Visible to students
Please remove all jewellery before class
For safety during pole work, please ensure all rings, bracelets, necklaces and earrings are removed before class. This helps protect both you and the poles.

Recommendations
Last run: Today 9:15am · Next scheduled: Monday 9am · 8 active insights
Scanning studio data…
🚨 Action Needed
3 items
Belle Currie
No-shows ×3
3 consecutive no-shows — Level 2 (29 Apr, 6 May, 13 May). No contact made. Still enrolled and balance outstanding.
✦ Reach out personally — check if she's OK and still wants her spot. If no response in 48h, consider releasing to waitlist.
Stella Mitchell
4-week cancels
Cancelled Spin Virgin (Thu 6pm) 4 weeks in a row — 22 Apr, 29 Apr, 6 May, 13 May. Always cancelled same day.
✦ Check if Thursday 6pm no longer works for her. Could she move to the Friday session? Free up the spot if she can't commit.
Jade Thompson
Zero attendance
Enrolled in Level 3 + Invert Tech but hasn't attended any class in 3 weeks. Still on season, no injury on file.
✦ Welfare check — is everything OK? If disengaged, a personal message now is easier than a churn conversation later.
📉 Retention & Engagement Drops
2 groups
High-value students scaling back
5 students
5 students who took 5+ classes in Season 3 are now enrolled in only 1–2 this season.
Emma Harris, Sophie Lawson, Dana Park, Kylie Rhodes, Rachel Kim
Combined revenue drop: ~$1,200 vs last season.
✦ Send a personalised "we miss you in more classes" email — offer a multi-class incentive or just check what changed.
Season 3 students who didn't return
8 students
8 students were active all of Season 3 but didn't enrol in Season 4. No cancellation on file.
✦ Early churn — these are your most likely re-activations if reached out to soon. A quick "we'd love to have you back" goes a long way.
🏫 Class & Instructor Health
4 flags
6 Virgin — poor attendance
At risk
Only 3 enrolled. Average attendance this season: 40%. 2 of 3 students have each missed 3+ weeks. Current timeslot: Wednesday 7pm.
✦ Email the 3 students — ask if Wednesday 7pm works or if another slot would suit better. If no traction, consider folding into Dance Virgin or cancelling.
Dance — low enrolment, strong casuals
Healthy
Only 3 enrolled but 6–8 casual drop-ins every week. Revenue is solid — don't let the enrolment number mislead.
✦ No action needed. Consider offering casuals a season enrolment incentive — converting even 2 would lock in $300+.
Maz — Level 3 retention dip
Instructor flag
2 students from Maz's Tuesday Level 3 didn't re-enrol this season. 4 no-shows in her class over the past 4 weeks (vs 1 in Chloe's equivalent).
✦ Worth a gentle check-in with Maz — not a performance issue necessarily, but worth understanding. Could be scheduling, vibe, or just life stuff.
Mimi — teaching load 60%
FYI
Mimi is currently running 16 of 27 class sessions (59%). Chloe covers 6, Maz 5. The imbalance is a burnout risk heading into a busy season.
✦ Consider shifting the new Level 5 or Advanced Floor session to Chloe. Redistributing 2 sessions would bring Mimi to ~50%.
💳 Revenue & Billing Signals
2 flags
Overdue plans — no recent chase
2 plans
Belle Currie ($120 overdue) and Jessica Neary ($75 overdue) both have payment plans that have been overdue for 14+ days with no chase action recorded.
✦ Send a reminder now — payment plans only work if they're followed up consistently.
Casual-to-season upsell window
Opportunity
14 students have attended 3+ casual classes this season but haven't enrolled. Based on past seasons, ~30% convert if contacted before week 6.
✦ Week 5 now — this is the ideal conversion window. A targeted "lock in your spot" message could add $1,400+ this season.
📅 Demand & Scheduling
Season 4
Level 2
24 enrolled
2 sessions × ~12 cap = 24 spots. Zero buffer — any late enrolments go to waitlist.
✦ Add a Wednesday or Friday 6:30pm Level 2 session. Estimated demand: 8–10 students.
Level 5
23 enrolled
1 session × ~12 cap = significant overflow. Level 5 is your second-biggest class.
✦ Add a Tuesday or Saturday 10am Level 5. Mimi already teaches Saturday morning.
Level 3
23 enrolled
1 main + 1 overflow session. Tight for 23 students.
✦ Add a Thursday 7:30pm Level 3. Frees Maz's session and absorbs overflow.
Level 1 — low intake
7 enrolled
Your pipeline for all other levels. Low intake now = lower numbers across the board in 2–3 seasons.
✦ Run a beginner campaign before season end — target the casual list and social media.
Full class demand — Season 4
ClassStudentsDemandSessionsRecommendation

🤖
Hey! I'm your studio assistant. I have access to all 138 Season 4 students and their enrolments.

Exemption requests are reviewed manually. Access remains restricted until approved or paid.
Season Transfer or Cancellation
Use this for changes to a student's entire season enrolment. For a single missed class, use the catch-up / individual class cancel option instead.
Cancelling a full season enrolment. Apply the studio cancellation policy or manually set a refund/credit amount.
Pro-rata calculation: 2 of 8 weeks completed = 75% remaining → suggested refund: $120
